string.text: I heard you're looking for people to work for you.

Yes, you heard right. This is what I can do: I will pay you a base daily salary of %s rubles and I will add %s rubles for every job you complete. Try to keep busy everyday and you will earn more, otherwise you can kiss our contract goodbye and will have to start from the beginning. Come talk to me when you want your money.
Yeah, it's a deal.
I'm here for my money.
Sure, I have it here, your total salary amounts to
Sure, I have it here, your total salary amounts to %s rubles, I also threw in a small bonus for the great work you did, keep it up.
Good, thank you sir.
Perfect, I'll take it all for myself.
Good, I'll share it with my squad mates.
I thought about it and I want to end my salary contract.
You certain about this, agent?
Yes, I need a break.
No worries! If you change your mind, come back tomorrow, and we'll discuss a new contract.
On second thought, nevermind.
I heard you're looking for people to work for you.

Yes, you heard right. This is what I can do: I will pay you a base daily salary of %s rubles and I will add %s rubles for every job you complete. Try to keep busy everyday and you will earn more, otherwise you can kiss our contract goodbye and will have to start from the beginning. Come talk to me when you want your money.
Yeah, it's a deal.
I'm here for my money.
Sure, I have it here, your total salary amounts to
Sure, I have it here, your total salary amounts to %s rubles, I also threw in a small bonus for the great work you did, keep it up.
Good, thank you sir.
Perfect, I'll take it all for myself.
Good, I'll share it with my squad mates.
I thought about it and I want to end my salary contract.
You certain about this, agent?
Yes, I need a break.
No worries! If you change your mind, come back tomorrow, and we'll discuss a new contract.
On second thought, nevermind.
